modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to update and add links on the USD website

full_description_text:
- I need to update an existing link on the USD website.  
- Also, I want to add a new link too.  
- Just thought it would be easier to do it all at once!
